query: motion blur photograph long exposure subject in motion
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / intentional_blur: motion blur, long exposure subject motion - artistic streaks and dynamic blur

response.objective_caption: A radial burst of soft pink, coral, yellow, and green color streaks emanating from a central point, with a small dark elongated shape and pale blue-gray patch positioned near the center-right, set against a blurred green band at the bottom edge.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A radially blurred explosion of soft pink, coral, yellow, and green streaks emanating from a central vortex, rendered with extreme motion blur and abstracted forms so that any recognizable subject dissolves into pure flowing color; a small dark elongated shape and pale blue-gray patch near the center suggest a barely discernible insect or object caught in the abstract chromatic rush.
